summary: All new classes and the keyframe renamed with ds- prefix; design-system invariant restored. — Full detail and corrected proposal in EXP-261-overview-hero-rework-v2.json. Resolution path: decider applies EXP-261 patches → curmudgeon spot-check → on green, close ISS-1573 as fixed-by-EXP-261.
fix_summary: All 11 new CSS classes renamed with ds- prefix (ds-thesis-hero / ds-thesis-statement / ds-thesis-meta / ds-thesis-badge / ds-thesis-badge-dot / ds-thesis-badge-pre / ds-thesis-badge-date / ds-thesis-figures / ds-tf-item / ds-tf-number / ds-tf-textnum / ds-tf-accent / ds-tf-label / ds-tf-link). Keyframe renamed to ds-thesis-badge-pulse. CSS selectors and HTML class attributes both updated. The id="ds-thesis-statement" used by aria-labelledby also carries the prefix. EXP-261 includes a mechanical-grep audit acceptance criterion that NO new class introduced lacks the ds- prefix.
